assertions.title: Stock Daily Data Covers 5-Year Date Range
assertions.reason: 341 pre-2021 stocks have data starting only from 2025-08-06, not 2021-01-04. Backfill scripts exist and are correct but were never run to completion for the full universe.

assertions.title: Sufficient Row Count Per Stock
assertions.reason: 341 pre-2021 stocks have ~152 rows instead of >= 1100. Only 2 stocks have 1000+ rows.

assertions.title: No Significant Gaps in Stock Daily Data
assertions.reason: Within existing data range gaps are minimal, but 5-year backfill prerequisite not met. Most stocks only have ~155 days of data, not 5 years.

assertions.title: Backfill Scripts Are Idempotent
assertions.reason: No duplicates found in klines table. Code uses UPSERT via ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE properly implemented.

assertions.title: Backfill Scripts Support Resume
assertions.reason: Resume logic exists: per-stock MAX(trade_time) check, skip logic, start_date adjustment to resume from last checkpoint.

assertions.title: All ~1000 Stocks Backfilled
assertions.reason: Only 423 distinct stocks in klines (DAY), need >= 800. Below 600 fail threshold.

assertions.title: Post-2021 IPO Stocks Backfilled from List Date
assertions.reason: Post-2021 IPO stocks start from 2025-08-06, not their list_date (1400+ days late). Backfill not executed for expanded universe.

blockers.description: Stock backfill scripts are well-implemented (idempotent, resumable, correct TuShare usage) but were never run to completion for the full expanded universe of ~1000 stocks. Only 423 stocks have data, and most only have ~155 days.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 2 passed, 5 failed. Root cause: backfill scripts are correctly implemented but were not run to completion for the full expanded universe.
